projects.pageDescription: Projects built during and after my bootcamp, covering real-world features like authentication, CRUD, filtering, and clean UI patterns. Click any project to see details, key features, and repos.
projects.noResultsMessage: No projects match the selected filters.

about.pageDescription: Junior Full Stack Developer with a background in technology-driven creative fields. Focused on building clean, scalable applications with modern JavaScript and the MERN stack.

sections.title: Who Am I
paragraphs: Luís is a Junior Full Stack Developer building web applications with the MERN stack.
Clean architecture, maintainable code, and practical product thinking guide how software is designed and built.
Based in Porto, Portugal and open to remote and international opportunities.

sections.title: How I Approach Building
paragraphs: A background in digital audio production and interactive systems shaped a system-oriented way of thinking. Structure first, then implementation.
Applications are built with clarity and separation of concerns in mind. Backend logic follows MVC principles, APIs are RESTful, and React interfaces stay modular and predictable as projects grow.
Shipping early, iterating fast, and refining over time is the preferred workflow.

sections.title: What I'm Looking For
paragraphs: A Junior Full Stack or Frontend Developer role within a product-driven team.
Interested in startups or growing companies building real products where ownership, clean code, and quality matter.
Looking to contribute to real-world systems while continuing to grow in a collaborative environment.

education.title: Full Stack Web Development Bootcamp
items: Full-time immersive program (+400 hours) focused on modern JavaScript and full-stack development
Built and deployed React-based frontend applications with modular component architecture
Developed backend systems using Node.js and Express
Designed RESTful APIs and implemented JWT-based authentication
Applied client-server architecture and collaborative Git workflows

education.title: Bachelor of Arts in Music Production & Electronic Music
items: Worked with programming-oriented tools such as Max/MSP, Java, and Arduino
Focused on music production and technology-driven creative systems
Extensive work with digital audio systems and signal flow design
Strengthened analytical thinking and structured problem-solving

experience.title: DJ & Music Producer
items: Designed and maintained complex technical setups for live performances
Worked with programming-oriented tools and hardware controllers
Managed projects from planning to execution under strict deadlines

experience.title: DJ Teacher
items: Delivered structured lessons focused on digital audio tools and production workflows
Guided students through technical setups and systematic problem-solving
Adapted teaching methods to different learning styles
Strengthened communication, mentoring, and planning abilities

experience.title: ICT Teacher & Music Teacher
items: Planned and delivered structured lessons within defined curricula
Developed strong communication and classroom management skills
Worked within institutional guidelines and deadlines

experience.title: Technical Advisor - Musical Instruments & Audio Equipment
items: Provided technical consultation and troubleshooting
Assisted clients in selecting and configuring audio equipment
Strengthened technical support and communication skills

introLines: Feel free to reach out through any of the options below.
I'm open to remote and international opportunities.
